1892130.name: RPG Maker MZ - KR Legendary Palaces - Mermaid Tileset
1892130.description:
Add a legendary Mermaid Palace to your RPG! Soft blue and green tones, coordinated statues and pillars, and lots of details make the perfect backdrop for your search for mystical people of the sea!

Features:

Ground Tiles:

Plain water
pipe-edged water
stone-edged water
4 types of coordinated floor tiles make it easy to mix and match for the look you want! Make your floors high contrast or nice and subtle…whatever works for you!
shell spike traps
green edging
hole tiles

Wall Tiles:

Dark walls, light walls, stone and brick…all with a touch of shimmery mermaid tones. One roof tile also included.

Also featuring:

stairs to match all floors
small accent pillars
large accent pillars (plain and themed)
plain arch
detailed arch
raised platform
coordinated throne
mirror/window
treasure box
push block
bridge rails
multiple statues
magic rings
seashells, kelp and lots of little details!
plus more!

Events and Animations: Treasure chest and blue fire!

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
1892130.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
